description_long: This sconce features a vertical black metal pole anchored by a round, sturdy base. Two spherical lamp heads, each with a dark outer shell and a visible inner light source, are mounted at different heights on horizontal arms extending from the central pole. The lamp heads are positioned on opposite sides, creating a balanced, symmetrical appearance. The design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The materials appear to be primarily metal with glass or plastic diffusers for the bulbs. The overall look is functional yet stylish, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, dual-headed sconce with a black metal pole, round base, and two spherical lamp heads on opposite sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing both spherical lamp heads clearly, each mounted on a horizontal arm at different heights.
description_view_1: Side view with both lamp heads aligned vertically, revealing the slim profile of the pole and base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both lamp heads visible but reversed in position.
description_view_3: Side view with only one lamp head fully visible, emphasizing the offset arrangement.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a balanced, symmetrical arrangement. The use of spherical lamp heads and a simple black pole gives it a contemporary, understated look.
